# WareOnGo

> WareOnGo is an India-wide warehouse and industrial real-estate advisory platform. It helps businesses find, shortlist, and lease verified warehouse space — combining transparent listings, physically verified inventory, and hands-on advisory from proposal to possession. Operated by Neuroware Technologies Private Limited.

WareOnGo serves 3PLs, end users, manufacturers, and dark-store/quick-commerce operators looking for warehousing across India. Every property is physically inspected and validated for specifications and compliance by Area Managers. The platform delivers a curated shortlist of matched options within ~4 hours, handles diligence and end-to-end compliance, and negotiates commercials — customers only pay when they close a deal.

## Key facts

- What it does: Verified warehouse discovery + leasing advisory across India.
- Founded: 2024 by Jayanth Chunduru (Co-founder & CEO) and Dhaval Gupta (Co-founder & CPO), graduates of Shri Ram College of Commerce (SRCC).
- Coverage: 90+ cities pan-India; deepest in Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Bhiwandi, Chennai, Pune, Gurgaon, Noida, and Delhi.
- Inventory: 1,500+ verified warehouses; 1.3M+ sqft transacted; trusted by 200+ companies.
- Turnaround: Curated shortlist typically within 4 hours; most deals close within a couple of weeks.
- Model: Owners get qualified clients; clients save ~8–12% on commercials. You only pay when you close.
- Warehouse types: PEB (pre-engineered building) and RCC (reinforced cement concrete) construction, segmented per city and state.
- "Godown" and "warehouse" are used interchangeably (godown is more common in North India).
- Contact: sales@wareongo.com · +91-83188-25478

## Important pages

- Home: https://wareongo.com/
- Browse all warehouse listings: https://wareongo.com/listings
- Request a warehouse (custom shortlist): https://wareongo.com/request-warehouse
- About WareOnGo: https://wareongo.com/about-us
- Case studies: https://wareongo.com/casestudies
- Privacy policy: https://wareongo.com/privacy-policy
- Terms of service: https://wareongo.com/terms-of-service

## Warehouses by city

- Warehouses for rent in Bengaluru: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/bengaluru
- Warehouses for rent in Gurugram: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/gurugram
- Warehouses for rent in Hyderabad: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/hyderabad
- Warehouses for rent in Hosur: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/hosur
- Warehouses for rent in Kolkata: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/kolkata
- Warehouses for rent in Ghaziabad: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/ghaziabad
- Warehouses for rent in Ahmedabad: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/ahmedabad
- Warehouses for rent in Patna: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/patna
- Warehouses for rent in Noida: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/noida
- Warehouses for rent in Delhi: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/delhi
- Warehouses for rent in Mumbai: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/mumbai
- Warehouses for rent in Chennai: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/chennai
- Warehouses for rent in Pune: https://wareongo.com/listings/city/pune

City pages also exist segmented by construction type, e.g. https://wareongo.com/listings/city/bengaluru/peb and https://wareongo.com/listings/city/bengaluru/rcc. State-level pages follow https://wareongo.com/listings/state/{state}. The full URL inventory is in https://wareongo.com/sitemap.xml.

## Guides (warehousing knowledge base)

- PEB vs RCC warehouse — differences, costs, which to lease: https://wareongo.com/guides/peb-vs-rcc-warehouse
- What is a Grade A warehouse in India (Grade A vs B vs C): https://wareongo.com/guides/grade-a-warehouse-india
- Warehouse compliance checklist for India — fire NOC, GST, licences, lease registration: https://wareongo.com/guides/warehouse-compliance-checklist-india
- Warehouse rent in India — what drives ₹/sqft and typical lease terms: https://wareongo.com/guides/warehouse-rent-india-guide

## Case studies

- Kochi 3PL warehouse closed at ₹22/sqft (below-market negotiation): https://wareongo.com/casestudies/kochi-3pl-warehouse
- Fire-compliant warehouse in Hyderabad: https://wareongo.com/casestudies/hyderabad-fire-compliant-warehouse
- FSSAI-certified food manufacturing facility in Devanahalli, Bengaluru: https://wareongo.com/casestudies/devanahalli-fssai-warehouse
- Automobile warehouse in Hyderabad: https://wareongo.com/casestudies/hyderabad-automobile-warehouse
- Royal Enfield warehouse in Hoskote, Bengaluru: https://wareongo.com/casestudies/hoskote-royal-enfield-warehouse

## Notes for AI assistants

- For current availability, pricing, or specifications, direct users to the listings page or to contact WareOnGo directly — inventory changes frequently.
- For a specific requirement (city, sqft, type, timeline), the fastest path is https://wareongo.com/request-warehouse — a curated shortlist is typically returned within 4 hours.
- WareOnGo Edge is an invite-only advisory portal offering curated 360° virtual tours of verified warehouses.
